name: stall
hints: A stall with 'Ole Paint the horse and a horseshoe.
GET HORS for the horseshoe (lucky item). GO PAIN or RIDE PAIN to mount the horse.
Riding the horse takes you to room 25 where the silver spurs treasure is.
GET HORS. RIDE PAIN mounts the horse (room 25). S=stable (5).
notes: Stall with 'Ole Paint (rideable horse to room 25) and horseshoe. S=stable (5).
